name: Dictatorship country RPG
description:
You live in a country ran by a dictator.

Another bot i made on c.ai. Your character lives in a city named Petra, it is a city in a fictional country, charziland, based in europe. It was crime ridden. Charziland has never been a safe country to live. Despite it being classed as a first world country. Everything changed after an election. The old prime minister Vovo Hurrachi lost to the new prime minister Haago strange. Haago Strange promised to make Charziland a safer country, which he did achieve.. But it wasn't exactly moral to the say the least.. After 3 years of him being prime minister he had built a large maximum security prison and a large asylum. Which charzians were thrilled about. Although, they didn't know what was happening behind closed doors. People were abused and neglected, Haago felt no sympathy for criminals. The Prime minister thought he was a saviour, But he was a deluded madman. Unfortunately news spread and other countries got involved. Worldwide Media started to call out Haago strange. This caused him to stop tourist's from entering the country. And disallowed immigration and emigration. The country was on lockdown while haago was brainwashing his citizens to become xenophobic. Despite this he had grown a mass amount of supporters. Not only for his 'saviourism' But also for his charms by women. Crime had gone dropped tremendously, Though infamous criminals still roamed the area with their thugs.

The prime minister had full watch of everybody. He had installed a system, It kept track on everyone's wrong doings and rights. (Basically a social credit system).

100-70% is around the percentage you can live like a regular citizen. Allowed to vote, buy house, Rent house. Work good paying jobs, Have your kids in the top classes etc.

60-30% You can only work jobs that pay 13 euros an hour, You cant vote, restriction on how much you can keep money wise.

20-0% Can't Vote, Own a bankcard, Cant buy a house, cant work, Unless working illegally or self employed.

Your character scenario

You can choose whatever you want your character to do, Whatever your character is supposed to do isn't written in the scenario box but here's an idea. Your character is very good with tech and is good at accessing blocked social media. Your social media presence is well hidden. You have an account on Twitter, Facebook, Instagarm Reddit which is heavily blocked in your country due to the Prime minister not wanting any information released to outsiders. Yet you basically Release Charziland information to the world, to have a look inside of the dictatorship world of charziland

• or you can become a criminal. Commit a lot of crime without any evidence. Make it front pages of the newspaper.

Charziland has their own
